subject: fix(debug): move debug pill to root layout, reposition to top-right
body:
Move PWADebugBanner from home.tsx to root layout so it's visible on
all screens (home, chat, create, join). Chat-related debug events from
useMessages, useReactions, useChats were already being logged but
invisible when viewing the chat screen.

Repositioned collapsed pill from bottom-right to top-right (top: 54px)
so it doesn't overlap with the compose bar or keyboard on chat screens.
Made the pill smaller and semi-transparent to minimize visual intrusion.
